worktree_state.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
  "id": "pos",
  "name": "POS Module",
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "status": "stub",
  "description": "POS entegrasyonu - kasa sistemleri, yazarkasa ve harici POS bağlantıları",

  "type": "feature",
  "category": "integration",

  "author": {
    "name": "E-Menum Team",
    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
  },

  "compatibility": {
    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
    "node": ">=20.0.0"
  },

  "dependencies": {
    "modules": ["auth", "organization", "order", "menu"],
    "optional": ["payment", "inventory"]
  },

  "provides": {
    "services": ["IPosService", "IPosIntegrationService"],
    "events": [
      "pos.connected",
      "pos.disconnected",
      "pos.order_synced",
      "pos.menu_synced",
      "pos.sync_failed"
    ],
    "permissions": [
      "pos:view",
      "pos:configure",
      "pos:sync",
      "pos:manage"
    ]
  },

  "tier": {
    "minimum": "professional",
    "features": {
      "professional": ["basic_pos_sync", "order_export"],
      "business": ["basic_pos_sync", "order_export", "bidirectional_sync", "menu_sync"],
      "enterprise": ["basic_pos_sync", "order_export", "bidirectional_sync", "menu_sync", "custom_pos_integration", "realtime_sync"]
    }
  },

  "plannedFeatures": [
    "Order synchronization",
    "Menu synchronization",
    "Inventory sync",
    "Receipt printing",
    "Cash drawer integration",
    "Multiple POS support",
    "Real-time sync",
    "Offline mode",
    "Popular POS integrations (Adisyo, Protel, etc.)"
  ],

  "estimatedRelease": "Q4 2026"
}
